calendar.matters:
SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar May-13-2010 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
David Foran, Esq., for Plaintiff/Cross Defendant/Respondent for Maribelle Navarro, who is also present.
Defendant/Cross Complainant/Appellant Karl B. Nicholas appears on his own behalf.

This case comes on regularly for trial de novo. All parties and witnesses are sworn.

Maribelle Navarro testifies on her own behalf.

Karl Nicholas testifies on his own behalf.

At the conclusion of the hearing, the matter is taken under submission. Plaintiff's envelope of exhibits is retained.

Judge Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: V. Mack, not reported (D318)
